description: A rigorous truncation-error analysis as used in Duarte–Koch (2020) has not yet been carried out for our N = 40 Chebyshev-collocation Galerkin matrices. Until this is computed (e.g., via decay of singular values or explicit estimates on the norm of the omitted spectral tail), the numerical estimates for σ_p remain non-rigorous.
action_taken: A rigorous truncation-error analysis as used in Duarte–Koch (2020) has not yet been carried out for our N = 40 Chebyshev-collocation Galerkin matrices. Until this is computed (e.g., via decay of singular values or explicit estimates on the norm of the omitted spectral tail), the numerical estimates for σ_p remain non-rigorous.
